triage_rows.direction: keep_the_existing_supervision loop routing when the supervisor-loop change layer remains stable
reconfigure_supervision loop routing immediately when supervision_loop_mode_change flips state
refresh_the_requested supervisor target when reopen_target_change flips state

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the narrow runtime-stack supervisor loop signal feed.
A supervising loop can watch it to know when supervisor-loop routing semantics changed without rereading the signal feed every cycle.
